commands: set -euo pipefail; echo "=== diag_start ==="; date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ; systemctl is-active fjcloud-api || true; systemctl status fjcloud-api --no-pager -l || true; journalctl -u fjcloud-api --since "30 minutes ago" --no-pager || true; ss -ltnp || true; awk -F= '/^(PORT|HOST|BIND)=/ { print } /^(STRIPE_SECRET_KEY|STRIPE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY|STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET)=/ { print $1 "=<redacted>" }' /etc/fjcloud/env || true; echo "=== diag_end ==="
